cards.name: 9 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency

cards.name: 5 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: end of conflict, cooperation, agreements, truces, harmony, peace, avoiding conflict

cards.name: 2 of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: indecision, hesitancy, anxiety, too much information, no right choice, truth revealed
